query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads, COUNT(CASE WHEN isApproved = 1 THEN 1 END) as approved, COUNT(CASE WHEN isApproved = 0 AND isRejected = 0 THEN 1 END) as pending FROM gigLeads;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 21BFt5o7WZAgbzs.root --database 2zCg9SPoUukX8rXL62G4yf --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads, COUNT(CASE WHEN isApproved = 1 THEN 1 END) as approved, COUNT(CASE WHEN isApproved = 0 AND isRejected = 0 THEN 1 END) as pending FROM gigLeads;
